plugins.name: eca-pdp
plugins.description: Connects to a Shopify store via the Shopify CLI, duplicates the live theme into a development theme, and installs a research-backed high-converting product page template. Built for Shopify's Horizon theme architecture.

plugins.name: eca-promo
plugins.description: Plan and build a complete promotional sale campaign — offer, email/SMS, paid ads, on-site changes, and a dated Go-Live timeline.
